title: diopogon hirtus subsp. arenarius
intro: Diopogon hirtus subsp. arenarius, also known as the 'Beach Butterfly Lily', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally used in Asian medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Diopogon hirtus subsp. arenarius include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and soothe respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often used in infusions or decoctions, and its rhizomes can be dried and processed into capsules or powders.
